title: 推陈出新
description:
This is a texture pack that replaces old minecraft textures with newer ones.
这是一款把minecraft 老版本纹理 替换为 高版本纹理 的材质包
body:
This texture is ported by up himself.
Based on the original texture of the high version, we have made some modifications such as renaming, texture and so on to adapt to the ID and model of the low version.
Of course, there are still water, boxes, grass cubes and other materials that have not been ported yet.
Up will port them in stages.
Please take care of me!
本材质由up本人独立完成移植制作
在高版本原版材质的基础上进行了 重命名；材质 等等修改来适配低版本的ID和模型
当然此材质还有水，箱子，草方块等材质还没有进行移植
up后续会分期进行移植
还请多多关照[献花]
以下是部分展示Here are some of the displays
![新材质](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aa1fe5692e6f437aaec2fd582bb68c847a0ccb1.png)
